name: Adelle Corp
declaringWar: You stand in the way of my people. Let us solve this like warriors!
attacked: You dare have the courage to challenge nod, but no fear, for I will sweep you out of history.
defeated: You have the guts to call my body a corpse but beware, I know what will happen to our future- our tiberium future.
introduction: If I am cut, Do I not bleed?
tradeRequest: I am not always this generous, but we hope you take this rare opportunity we give you.

name: The New Movement
declaringWar: It is in  my Intentions to spread the word of Nod into your land.
attacked: Pitiful fool! Now we shall destroy you!
defeated: I see for the black hand has been unworthy to serve Kane.
introduction: If you would stay out of our way then you might live to tell your tale.
tradeRequest: I would be grateful if you agreed on the following proposal.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [non-air] units>

name: Jewish_Anarchy
declaringWar: It is in  my Intentions to spread the word of Nod into your land.
attacked: Pitiful fool! Now we shall destroy you!
defeated: I see for the black hand has been unworthy to serve Kane.
introduction: If you would stay out of our way then you might live to tell your tale.
tradeRequest: I would be grateful if you agreed on the following proposal.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [non-air] units>

name: Germany
startIntroPart1: 새로운 독일이 일어섰습니다. 바이마르 공화국이 해체되고 히틀러의 독일국이 등장한 지 3년이 지났습니다. 대공황의 어려운 시기를 지나 경제가 다시 안정되었고, 대규모 실업 문제도 해결되었습니다.베르사유 조약이 독일에 부과한 군사 제한은 오래전에 잊혀졌으며, 국방군은 날로 강해지고 있습니다. 또 다른 세계 대전이 다가오고 있습니다.
startIntroPart2: Great Prince Bismarck, the German people look up too you to lead them to greater days of glory. Their determination is strong, and now they turn to you, their beloved iron chancellor, to guide them once more. Will you rile and conquer through blood and iron, or foster the Germanic arts and industry? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: I cannot wait until ye grow even mightier. Therefore, prepare for war!
attacked: Corrupted villain! We will bring you into the ground!
defeated: Germany has been destroyed. I weep for the future generations.
introduction: Guten tag. In the name of the great German people, I bid you welcome.
tradeRequest: It would be in your best interest, to carefully consider this proposal.
uniques: [3] Happiness from each type of luxury resource
Militaristic City-States grant units [4] times as fast when you are at war with a common nation

name: Italy
startIntroPart1: 파시즘의 부상과 함께 이탈리아는 새로운 영광의 시대에 접어들었습니다. 이탈리아군은 현재 에티오피아를 점점 확장되는 이탈리아 식민제국에 편입하는 과정에 있지만, 무솔리니의 야망은 거기서 멈추지 않습니다. 지중해를 지배하는 것은 언제나 이탈리아의 운명이였으며, 유럽에서는 새로운 질서가 형성되고 있습니다. 변화의 거대한 물결이 몰려올 때, 이탈리아는 그 물결의 정점에 자리 잡아야 합니다. 그렇지 않으면 휩쓸려 사라지고 말 것입니다.
startIntroPart2: Tireless monarch, the frontlines of Italy once more lay bare and unprotected. Can you rally both soldier and ship to the defense of her borders, ensuring that Italy remains unassailable? Will your nation bring a new Rinascimento to bring new prosperity for her people? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Although unwanted, war is a constant of this world, and it is regrettable that it must fall on us both.
attacked: Italy is far from a stranger of war! I will show you that we are far from pushovers!
defeated: It is sad that my forces were not enough to defend this nation... Addio, amico mio.
introduction: Saluti, you walk upon the land of the former Roman Empire. I am Victor Emmanuel II, King Of Italy. Do you rule with benevolence, or absolute tyranny?
tradeRequest: Our cultures have much to share, and this deal proves it.
uniques: [2] Happiness from each type of luxury resource
Cities are razed [2] times as fast
[+5]% Production when constructing [CivilFactory] buildings [in all cities]
[+15]% Science cost of researching new Technologies
